public static RTHandle Alloc(int width, int height, int slices = 1, DepthBits depthBufferBits = DepthBits.None, GraphicsFormat colorFormat = 4, FilterMode filterMode = 0, TextureWrapMode wrapMode = 0, TextureDimension dimension = 2, bool enableRandomWrite = false, bool useMipMap = false, bool autoGenerateMips = true, bool isShadowMap = false, int anisoLevel = 1, float mipMapBias = 0, MSAASamples msaaSamples = MSAASamples.None, bool bindTextureMS = false, bool useDynamicScale = false, bool useDynamicScaleExplicit = false, RenderTextureMemoryless memoryless = 0, VRTextureUsage vrUsage = 0, string name = "")
